901001.desc:
Orange circles float in the air before your eyes.
The lights flutter and dance in the air, creating a haze.

Something is burning to death within.
Would you be scorched as well if the flames touched you?
901001.name: Ardor Blossom Moth

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Burn E.G.O Gift

results.text: At the start of the combat phase, allies without Wrath Sin Affinity Attack Skill take 5 Wrath damage

options.messageDesc: Win the battle to earn 2 Burn E.G.O Gifts

901002.desc:
Blood pours from above; the land of gold lies beyond.
The spiral ahead loudly screeches.

It must have reached this depth after burrowing and burrowing.
Although it has no eyes, it creaks to face you.
901002.name: Spiral of Contempt

options.messageDesc: Wrath & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.
Win the battle to earn a Keywordless E.G.O Gift and a Bleed E.G.O Gift

901003.desc:
A cry rings out in the ashen wilderness.
From the distance, an undulating wall of fog rises.

Its shape resembles a human.
Yet, it could be a spirit or a ghost taken form.

Its mouth, agape as if crying in despair, is completely dark.
messages: Look the mist in the eye.
901003.name: Rising Ashes

options.messageDesc: Wrath & Lust Advantage check. Pass to gain a Burn E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Look the mist in the eye.

901004.desc:
It gives blood to those who need it.
The only blood it has to give is its own.

Even those who don’t need a transfusion
are bled dry with scissors, forced to accept.

Thus, its road is filled with receivers that need blood.
901004.name: Nymph

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

901005.desc:
A wail fills the forest.
You can’t help but wonder what it’s so sorrowful for.

There’s a coffin in the middle of the woods.
It has been tied with multiple cords and ropes,
in what appears to be a desperate attempt to keep its contents from escaping.

However, the coffin continues to rumble and creak.
901005.name: Wailing Coffin

options.messageDesc: Wrath & Gluttony Advantage check. Pass to gain a Bleed E.G.O Gift.

901006.desc:
“Who are you, and what brings you here?”

A piece of paper rustles.

“Well, you came just at the right time for me;
I’ve urgent business that needs doing.
Won’t you take the job?”

It held out another piece of paper with lousy letters written on it.
Unfortunately, you can’t make sense of these lines and dots.

“How’s about it? You up for it?”
901006.name: Paper Chairman

options.messageDesc: Lust & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

901007.desc:
“Look at those butterflies! Aren’t they just beautiful?”

“And gander at that sunset, too!
Really makes you want to go for a stroll.”

“Why don’t you stop for a moment
and take a breather here?”

Something yellow gestures warmly at you.
901007.name: Sunset Wayfarer

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

results.text: At the start of the turn, heal 10 HP and 10 SP. (Up to 3 turns)

901008.desc:
A teddy bear suffers from having nails lodged into its body.

The bloodstains decorating it
are a telling sign of all the time it spent in pain.

The holes where its eyes should be are empty.
Nothing but dry red marks remain inside.

In spite of that, it stands with its arms wide,
endeavoring to fulfill its duty of giving hugs.
901008.name: Hurting Teddy Bear

options.messageDesc: Lust & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Bleed E.G.O Gift.
Win the battle to earn 2 Bleed E.G.O Gifts

901009.desc:
Candles quietly burn away.
Scribbling sounds are all that fill the air.

A trio of eyes takes turns glaring
into a grand tome, bound in skin.

You can’t tell what it’s referencing,
or if there is any deliberation in its writing;
hands are busy nonetheless.

Yearning for destruction and doom,
it writes and writes and writes.

You feel the passages it’s writing may be prophecies for someplace and sometime.
901009.name: Skin Prophet

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Burn E.G.O Gift

results.text: -1 Final Power at the start of the combat phase.

options.messageDesc: Win the battle to earn 2 Burn E.G.O Gifts

901010.desc:
A bell occasionally tolls in the red room.
It’s a heavy, subduing sound.

The statue is chanting something.
You’re unable to recognize its words.

But, you feel that whatever it is,
is not a joyous thing.

There’s a brass ring on the statue’s finger.
901010.name: My Form Empties

options.messageDesc: Lust & Gluttony Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.
Win the battle to earn a Keywordless E.G.O Gift and a Sinking E.G.O Gift

901011.desc:
An alleyway garbage dump.
Its atmosphere is stuffy and unpleasant thanks to the humidity from the rain.

A pile of old and torn umbrellas sits in a corner.

The umbrellas jiggled.
Looking closer, there’s a large fox underneath.

The umbrellas’ rusted iron blades have firmly rooted themselves in its back.
901011.name: Drifting Fox

options.messageDesc: Lust & Sloth & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.
Win the battle to earn a Keywordless E.G.O Gift and a Rupture E.G.O Gift

901012.desc:
A thing wearing human skin was dancing in place, clicking and creaking.
It soon spots me.
Clopping like a spider, it talks to me.

"I made this face yesterday."

Fwip-pip. Tap-trrt.
"What face do you think I'll make tomorrow?"

Fwip. Trrt-tap.
"What face should we make?"
messages: Cry and cry until you sink.
901012.name: Tomorrow's Expression

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Blunt E.G.O Gift

options.message: Cry and cry until you sink.

901013.desc:
You hear the quiet flickering of candles.
In this cramped room, you find a wooden doll, standing.

Are the talismans filling the room for a wish?

Does this wooden doll wish for anything?
901013.name: So That No One Will Cry

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift
Sloth & Wrath Advantage check. Then, maybe gain a Poise E.G.O Gift depending on the subsequent choice
Select to gain a Poise E.G.O Gift
Win the battle to earn a Rupture E.G.O Gift and a Poise E.G.O Gift

results.label: So That No One Will Cry

901014.desc:
A pained moan echoes across the heat.
It’s hard to tell if it comes from a beast or a human.

A sizzle spreads into the air
along with the smell of burning flesh.

“Please! I need water!
Won’t someone give me water to drink?”
901014.name: Brazen Bull

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift
Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift
Win the battle to earn a Keywordless E.G.O Gift and a Burn E.G.O Gift

901015.desc:
The air is thick with steam.

It's not simply gaseous water; the steam's color is brown.

Beyond the veil of steam, you hear a voice.

"Mhm! It's only right to drink straight from the bottle!"

"The ones from the west are good-tasting these days."

"You there! You like booze?"
messages: I don't know how to live without alcohol.
901015.name: Drunkard

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift

options.message: I don't know how to live without alcohol.
options.messageDesc: Run a Sloth & Gluttony Advantage check to gain an E.G.O Gift.

901016.desc:
The cavern is full of smells, good and bad.

“Been a while since I had visitors! I oughta give you a right treat.”

“Plum outta luck for eatery, I’ve already had all the food.”

“Straight as you can see, this glass o’ fairy wine is all I have.”

“Would ya care for a drink?”

A thick, slimy hand makes its offer.
messages: Let one person drink it all.
901016.name: Fairy Gentleman

options.message: Let one person drink it all.

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift
Win the battle to earn 2 Tremor E.G.O Gifts

901017.desc:
It records right and wrong.
Its job is to record the judgement of the one above.

It does not assess what it writes.
To lay down judgement is not a secretary’s role.

The scribe silently presented an emerald tablet.
901017.name: Heavenly Executor's Scribe

options.messageDesc: Run a Gluttony & Pride Advantage check to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

901018.desc:
What does this signboard say?
It hangs itself on a tree, trying to make its content known.

Its desperation is almost pitiable.
901018.name: Sign of Roses

options.messageDesc: Gluttony & Envy Advantage check. Pass to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift.
Win the battle to earn a Rupture E.G.O Gift and a Bleed E.G.O Gift

901019.desc:
The barren mudflat reeks of salt and rot.
What little jade-colored seawater is left there
doesn’t seem to have anything inside.

A giant clam walks before you.
With each step it takes, it sprays a fetid green muck.

Is the clam the source of the contamination,
or is it working to contain the filth?
messages: Throw the green substance at it.
901019.name: Ambling Pearl

options.messageDesc: Gluttony & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Pierce E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Throw the green substance at it.
options.messageDesc: Win the battle to earn a Pierce E.G.O Gift and a Tremor E.G.O Gift

901020.desc:
A field of white, yet somehow dark flowers is ahead.
The sky is red, the air windy and bleak.

One giant flower flutters amidst the field.

It resembles a person waving from afar.
901020.name: Drenched Gossypium

options.messageDesc: Run a Gluttony & Lust Advantage check to gain a Bleed E.G.O Gift.
Win the battle to earn 2 Bleed E.G.O Gifts

901021.desc:
You see a poor passenger, stranded between dimensions.
Most will never realize that this person ever disappeared.

Well, the transport company would know,
but they’ll simply pretend that the passenger never existed.

Lost and abandoned, tossed out like trash,
having no place left in the City.
messages: Point the direction it should go.
901021.name: Wayward Passenger

options.message: Point the direction it should go.
options.messageDesc: Gloom & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.
Win the battle to earn a Keywordless E.G.O Gift and a Charge E.G.O Gift
Gloom & Lust Advantage check. Pass to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.

901022.desc:
Sometimes, the mind wanders.

Where does such a mind end up?

If it had a physical destination,
then it must look like this.

An empty, humanlike statue
is where that mind would decide to settle.

Now, it extends its arms, trying to grab at anything.
messages: Reach out to grab its hand.
901022.name: Wandering Mind

options.message: Reach out to grab its hand.
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift
Gloom & Gluttony & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift.

901023.desc:
A resentful tree stands among a desolate plain.

The place has an air of umbrage.
Something feels discordant about the sky.

You note one twig growing out of the tree like an arm.

Though the tree is unmoving, it seems to want something.
901023.name: Monkey Tree

options.messageDesc: Select for a chance to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift
Select for a chance to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift
Select to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift
Select to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift

901024.desc:
“Croohoo, croohoo, croohoo.”
A giant toad cries inside a cave.

Patches of dark blue resin cover the cave.

This resin is like gloom.
A sap of gloom, not quite like tears or sadness.

The toad holds this resin.
901024.name: Blubbering Toad

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift
Win the battle to earn 2 Tremor E.G.O Gifts

901025.desc:
A person stands in the square.

They look this way, waving an arm.

The cavity in their head may be an eye,
or a bullet hole.

If it is, it must have been the work
of the revolver in their hand.

That person points the gun at you.
901025.name: Hole-in-the-Man

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

901026.desc:
A cluster of eyes looks this way.
The thing in the middle has the appearance of a tree branch, but it is human.

Heaven sometimes burrows;
other times, it makes a home in the heart.

Once taken root, that heaven
will only be visible through the eyes of others.
901026.name: Stuck In Heaven

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

901027.desc:
Oh, how blue this is.

The pure hue of blue
allows nothing to approach.

When you try to go near, your body is pushed away.
And yet, it is so, so blue.

You wish to have that color.

The irresistible allure
is almost tearing you apart.
901027.name: Blue-ish Star

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Blunt E.G.O Gift

901028.desc:
It’s a spider’s nest made of thorny vines
and filled with flowers, perhaps once used for celebration.

The buds appear to be filled with someone’s blood.
The bride and groom crawl between them.

As they scuttle around,
blood seeps out of their hands and feet.

It appears that they change sides
before the bottom one loses too much blood.
901028.name: Spider of Marriage

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

901030.desc:
This is a dark cavern.

Sounds of hard objects hitting each other loudly echo at random intervals.

The noise is coming from three large skulls. They approach us, clacking and rattling.

They have no bodies. So they roll. They make noises endlessly even as they roll.

Looking at the three skulls that rolled at our feet, we find they have different expressions.

Should we choose one of them?
901030.name: Chattering Teeth

options.messageDesc: Wrath & Envy Advantage check. Pass to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift.
Lust & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Pierce E.G.O Gift.

901031.desc:
It carries heavy objects without a word.

As it does its work,
the number on the electronic display seems to update.

Machines exist for a purpose.
You feel like you should give it an order.
messages: Order it to carry luggage faster.
901031.name: Steam Transport Machine

options.messageDesc: Envy & Gluttony & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Order it to carry luggage faster.
options.messageDesc: Win the battle to earn 2 Tremor E.G.O Gifts

901032.desc:
It’s a dark cityscape,
but the buildings are well-lit.

It appears that they are powered
by the massive buzzing cloud at the center.

The cloud has a head and two pairs of legs.
It resembles a sheep.

The “electric sheep” seems to be in pain.
Is it being siphoned of its power?
messages: Plug another cable into the electric sheep.
901032.name: Dreaming Electric Sheep

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Slash E.G.O Gift

options.message: Plug another cable into the electric sheep.

901033.desc:
“This centipede is capable of discharging a high voltage.”

That’s what the sign attached to the tank says.

Is this an aquarium, or a laboratory?

The segments of the creature spark each time they move,
suggesting faulty connections.

There are two buttons at the tank.

One is shaped like a thunderbolt, while the other looks like a waterdrop.
901033.name: Shock Centipede

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift
Envy & Wrath Advantage check. Pass to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.
Win the battle to earn a Rupture E.G.O Gift and a Charge E.G.O Gift

901034.desc:
This dark place might be a factory.

A sharp mechanical noise zips through the air.
Illuminating eyes are fixed on you.

A robot slowly approaches.

It appears to be incomplete, as suggested by the bare wires protruding with each movement.

Is that leakage antifreeze, or blood?

While you were wondering, the terminal on its chest flashed to life.

Looks like you can write something.
messages: Ask for an explanation of the “town”.
Tell it that you took a tour.
901034.name: kqe-1j-23

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Burn E.G.O Gift

options.message: Ask for an explanation of the “town”.
Tell it that you took a tour.

options.messageDesc: Win the battle to earn a Burn E.G.O Gift and a Charge E.G.O Gift

901035.desc:
“This here’s ma turf.”

“Here folks play by ma rules, or else!”

Sounds like there can be dire consequences.

“Let’s play rock, paper, scissors!”

“I’ll go fer scissors. How ‘bout you?”
901035.name: Will You Play?

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

901036.desc:
This flower was once a rose that could have been tiny and beautiful.

But now, the blood it holds gives off a cruel smell.

Drinking and growing giant, it sucked in blood that overflowed from a spring.

Without an end.

It greedily gobbles up the stream of blood with its branched roots.
messages: Plug the spring to stop it from drinking blood.
Break the spring's entryway to let more blood out.
Feed it the blood of the Sinners
901036.name: Four-hundred Roses

options.message: Plug the spring to stop it from drinking blood.
Break the spring's entryway to let more blood out.
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

options.message: Feed it the blood of the Sinners
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Bleed E.G.O Gift

901037.desc:
Something that creaks, squeaks, and shakes is stood before us.

Inside it is a pink liquid.

It heaves whenever the liquid container shakes.

Or it might be the liquid's movement that causes the massive glass body to move.

The liquid seems to consist of multiple things and beings.

Each droplet has its own face.

One sad-looking droplet is pushed away by its mean-faced peers.

The glass giant trembles, and a pink droplet is ejected.

The droplet is crying.
messages: Put the pink droplet back into its pink body.
901037.name: Children in the Flask

options.messageDesc: Lust & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Put the pink droplet back into its pink body.

901038.desc:
"I wipe everything."

"Cleaning is enjoyable."

"I like to be the same as others."

"……."

"I am frankly troubled."

"The model next to mine boasted that it has multiple parts that others don't."

"Is that what makes one special?"

"Am I special the way I am?"
901038.name: All-Around Cleaner

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

901039.desc:
The room's ceiling was too high. Yet it was so narrow that it felt like a tight space.

Something that looks like an old person sits on a chair, staring into a painting on the wall. It didn't so much as flinch.

A dark, thick, and sticky smoke crawls out from behind it.

Perhaps that's what loneliness might look like if it's visualized.

"What's a young one like you doing in this room."

It spoke to us, its eyes still glued to the painting. How long has it been aware?

"Are you interested in hearing my stories?"
messages: Say that you're willing to hear the stories.
901039.name: Smokey Old Man

options.message: Say that you're willing to hear the stories.
options.messageDesc: Gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift depending on the result of the following choice
Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

901040.desc:
Stars glow blue in the dark.

Looking at them up close, those weren't actually stars.

It was a person waving their arms with blue marbles in their hands.

"These are stars."

The person claims what they're holding are stars.

As if they read my mind and knew what I was thinking.
901040.name: Star Luminary

results.text: All allies gain +2 Final Power for the next battle
Start the next battle with +2 E.G.O resources of all affinities

options.messageDesc: Lust & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

results.text: All allies gain +1 Final Power for the next battle

901041.desc:
The centipede-like thing donned a rotten sheet of cloth.

The cloth reeks of rotting bodies, like it was used to dress a corpse.

There are strange booklets hanging all over its body.

Looking closely, those are prayer books.

What does it believe in, and what does it pray for?
messages: Take one of the prayer books from its body.
901041.name: Centipede Apostle

options.message: Take one of the prayer books from its body.
options.messageDesc: Run a Wrath & Gluttony Advantage check. Pass to gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift.

901042.desc:
That must be snakes, bugs, or the symbolization of fulfilled peace.

Looking closely, the fence of wire and the countless corpses caught up in it can be seen moving.

Those sacks of flesh entangled in painful ways must be the remains of those who perished in a war fought in the past.

Now, it moves like a living thing, wandering where the Smoke War may have taken place.

The concertina wire was a line crossed between you and me, and a separator.

However, this rusted, bloodstained wire now binds us together and squeezes us so our flesh and eyes meet.
messages: Sneak up and remove a part of the wire.
Cut the tip of a finger to drop my blood on the wire.
901042.name: The 4th Front of the Smoke War

options.message: Sneak up and remove a part of the wire.
options.messageDesc: Wrath & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Bleed E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Cut the tip of a finger to drop my blood on the wire.

901043.desc:
Tang- Tang- Tang-

The sound of plastic crashing is accompanied by the sloshing of a liquid.

It looks like something that used to be an employee of a company.

Its identity is evidenced by the now-worn formal outfit and the employee card.

The card is almost too battered and contaminated to recognize.

Wearing a box filled with Enkephalin on their head, the employee rams it into what looks like the door to a containment unit.

A rubber O-ring is worn around their neck. Could it be there to prevent Enkephalin from spilling?
901043.name: Forsaken Employee

options.messageDesc: Run a Gloom & Envy Advantage check to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.

901047.desc:
This is a dark forest, full of fog and vine.

An apple, rotten but still moving, runs to me in a hurry.

"Please help me, I need to hide."

"I'm just a poor, tiny apple... Cursed and thrown away."

Before I could answer, the apple hid its small body behind my leg.

"......."

Amidst the fog of the viney forest, the clop of a horse is heard.

It's a giant horse made of vines.

Mounted on it was a being with the head of a rose.

The vine horse stands before me and lets out heavy breaths that reek of green grass.

"I am on the hunt for someone. It needs to be taken care of urgently."

"What I am looking for is an apple that will become a princess, not knowing its rightful place."

"It must have passed this way. Do you know what direction it has taken?"
messages: Point it in the wrong direction.
901047.name: Rose Hunter

options.messageDesc: Wrath & Envy Advantage check. Pass to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift.
Win the battle to earn 2 Rupture E.G.O Gifts

options.message: Point it in the wrong direction.
options.messageDesc: Pride & Envy Advantage check. Pass to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift.

901049.desc:
A giant lizard-like thing with the cold skin of a machine stands before us.

Its long tail, shaped like the human hand, bends in all directions before straightening to point at me.

"The heavenly commander is who I serve."

"It is the duty of the commander's servant to follow commands."

"Tell me what you command."
901049.name: Heavenly Commander's Scribe

options.messageDesc: Gloom & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift.

901051.desc:
Clackle-

Clackle-

A mountain made out of holed rocks. It's shrouded with white fog.

Rocks can be heard clashing with each other.

There's a being with long limbs and stone-like skin piling up a tower.

Could it be a stone tower being made for a wish?

Or is it a cairn that is burying someone alive?
messages: Place a stone over the tower.
901051.name: Pagoda Veneration

options.message: Place a stone over the tower.
options.messageDesc: Sloth & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Poise E.G.O Gift.

901054.desc:
Whirr-clink. Whirr-clink.

Sounds of sticky, oily clockwork echoes.

It is the sound of each cog indents clicking into each other. It is the sound of flowing streams of water conjoining.

A tired, downcast duck stands before you.

The clockwork whirrs vigorously, but the rabbit appears weary.

... No, perhaps this is a duck.

The Rabbit asks.

'What am I, in your eyes?'
901054.name: Time Duck

options.messageDesc: Sloth & Envy Advantage check. Pass to gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift.

901056.desc:
Damp and slippery, this is the emerald forest.

A green rain was pouring down, seeming quite sticky.

You see someone next to you holding a large piece of grass like an umbrella.

'Oh dear, I'd advise against being hit by this rain.'

'Come on, get under this umbrella, all of you.'

'If you stand in the rain, you might melt down head first.'
messages: Go under the umbrella and wait until the rain stops.
Weather the rain and leave the place.
901056.name: Fairy-Long-Legs

options.message: Go under the umbrella and wait until the rain stops.
options.messageDesc: Win the battle to earn 2 Poise E.G.O Gifts

options.message: Weather the rain and leave the place.
options.messageDesc: Gluttony & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Poise E.G.O Gift.

901057.desc:
It's an empty room of cement.

Yet I can shake off the creeping feeling that something might be here.

Other Sinners scoff at me in disagreement.

There's a switch in the room.
901057.name: Dimensional Oxidation Variant

options.messageDesc: Gain a Charge E.G.O Gift depending on the result of the following choice
Select to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift

901058.desc:
'What do you think?'

The shard, suspended in air, asks.

'Those things revolving along the track.'

'They're bound by an unseen force, aren't they?'

The shard is surrounded by two different types of tracks. Some rotate wildly, while some do so gently.

'But I'm not binding them here because I want to.'

'They're stuck to me, you see.'

'What do you think?'
messages: I pity the ones that are bound.
I pity the one that binds.
901058.name: Dimensional Orbit Stabilizer

options.message: I pity the ones that are bound.
options.messageDesc: Gluttony & Wrath Advantage check. Pass to level up currently deployed Identities

options.message: I pity the one that binds.
options.messageDesc: Gluttony & Envy Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

901059.desc:
In the middle of a quiet and peaceful forest, a delicate tree branch is placed.

A small fairy with a green glow sits atop it.

Saying no words, the fairy waves at us, inviting us to come over and take a break.

It looked like it was smiling, and it might have been dancing.
messages: Take a break where you're standing.
901059.name: Faelantern

options.messageDesc: Gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift depending on the result of the following choice
Win the battle to earn 2 Sinking E.G.O Gifts
Select to gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift

options.message: Take a break where you're standing.
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift

901061.desc:
This place is like a giant scrapyard.

All kinds of refuse find their way here, only to be burned.

The difference is that this scrapyard collects nothing but bones.

Human bones beast bones and the bones of something that is neither human nor beast

All kinds of bones find their way here.

A faint voice can be heard from the pile, but it is too feeble to be understood.
messages: Search to find where the voice is coming from.
901061.name: Tomb of Bone

options.message: Search to find where the voice is coming from.
options.messageDesc: Gloom & Gluttony Advantage check. Pass to gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift.

901062.desc:
An alleyway of black and white.

The single streetlamp lighting the path makes the scenery all the more hazy.

Someone is standing in the light.

Pipipipip-

The device in the Abnormality's hand sounds an alarm.

'The results of the job interview for the big company I had last month are out today.'

'Everyone in this street prepares for exams and interviews.'

'They wait for the results to be announced, staking all they have on them, and once they're told they failed, they go far away and disappear.'

'So I changed my head; I'd like to fly away even if I don't make it.'

'Will you check the results for me?'

The device displayed a message that it didn't pass.

'What does it say? Did I pass?'
901062.name: Funeral of a Dying Butterfly

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift
Gloom & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift.

901063.desc:
'This is a warzone.'

'And my gun must blow someone up.'

The Abnormality spoke with clarity, loading its shotgun loudly.

'In this gory war, the devil approached me one day to suggest a deal.'

'It promised to give me a gun that can blow up anything, but the catch was that its last shell would land on the head of my beloved.'

'I accepted the gun and the ammunition with laughter.'

'My beloved, huh….'

'Did I ever have people I held that dearly? I couldn't be sure anymore.'

'I had to have joined this war for someone I loved, that much I remember.'

I noticed an old pendant worn on the shooter's neck.

'Thanks to that, I'm free to point the barrel at anyone I want. No matter where I fire it, this shotgun can blast anyone into fireworks like it hit them point blank, how wonderful is that?'

'I bet that fellow had their beloved.'

'Yup, I'm talking about the one whose head I just blew up.'

'They might have remembered what I don't. That makes this just too exhilarating.'

'Killing people who remember their loved ones, I mean.'

The shooter keeps firing its gun as it speaks.

The shotgun shoots out pellets as easily and lightly as the shooter laughs.

'By the way, whose side are you on?'
messages: Tell the shooter to look at the pendant on its neck.
Tell the shooter that you're on its side.
Tell the shooter that you're not on its side.
901063.name: Der Fluchschütze

options.message: Tell the shooter to look at the pendant on its neck.
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Poise E.G.O Gift

options.message: Tell the shooter that you're on its side.
options.messageDesc: Gloom & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Pierce E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Tell the shooter that you're not on its side.
options.messageDesc: Win the battle to earn a Poise E.G.O Gift and a Pierce E.G.O Gift

901066.desc:
Shhhh-chk.

Shhhh-chk.

There is a skeleton, making ominous, labored noises.

There is a shadow of somebody in its spine.

Does the shadow breathe, one must ponder.
messages: Pick up a respirator and put it in its mouth.
901066.name: Sleeping Bag of a Bygone Day

options.message: Pick up a respirator and put it in its mouth.
options.messageDesc: Pride & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Poise E.G.O Gift.

901067.desc:
I see a room filled with papers.

It was probably once spacious, but now, it's cramped thanks to the stacks of papers with scrawls occupying much of it.

Something swims this way in this sea of papers and documents.

The serpent made of papers slithered up to talk to me.

'This is hell.'

'The hell for homework and assignments all the people in the world have neglected to do.'

'People may think an assignment that they didn't get to finish is no big deal... How little do they know.'

'The assignments wanted to be completed and submitted on time!'

'This is where the overdue and forgotten assignments end up.'

'They're then plummeted into a hell where they suffer for eternity, forever left procrastinated.'

'How cruel students are! You may have seen us as little tasks you could put off, but we wished nothing more than to be handed over!'

'Let me ask you this... Have you ever been behind with an assignment? It doesn't matter if it was by unavoidable circumstances, tell me if you have abandoned any poor assignments!'
messages: Say that you haven't put off any.
901067.name: Overdue Assignments

options.message: Say that you haven't put off any.
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

901068.desc:
There is an entity bound to an extravagantly ornamented chair.

It appears as though the entity is shooting a stern glare this way.

It tries to say something... but its mouth is bound.

The King on the throne twists and thrashes, trying to approach... but the things that bind drags him away.

The beautiful yet cruel crimson strips of fabric. They pull mercilessly. They are...
901068.name: The King in Binds

options.messageDesc: Pride & Wrath Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.
Pride & Envy Advantage check. Pass to level up currently deployed Identities.

901069.desc:
Sounds of heavy rocks scraping against each other.

What looked like palms are made of black rocks.

At the tip of the fingers attached to the palms are smaller palms and smaller fingers.

It reaches out with the hand of the hand.
901069.name: Handshake of Handshakes

options.messageDesc: Pride & Envy Advantage check. Pass to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.

901073.desc:
The voice speaks.

'Yes. The deep sea is a dark place.'

'But at the end of that dark path is a light.'

'Because there are things that shine in the dark there.'

'Let's go there.'

'And we'll shine brighter than anything in that dark place.'

'We were all abandoned, yes. But we all had dreams, too. Remember?'

'Well, let's make our dreams come true. Let's sink together into the depths.'

The dim fluorescent lights impaling the entity's back flicker.
messages: Say that you will sink together.
Fix the entity's flickering fluorescent lights.
901073.name: Dream-Devouring Siltcurrent

options.message: Say that you will sink together.
options.messageDesc: Sloth & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Fix the entity's flickering fluorescent lights.
options.messageDesc: Sloth & Envy Advantage check. Pass to gain a Poise E.G.O Gift.
Win the battle to earn a Rupture E.G.O Gift and a Poise E.G.O Gift

901074.desc:
This is a corridor of a large, wooden mansion. Its floorboards are ancient.

You can hear creaking noises approaching from a distance. Something walks in this direction.

'My master had a very unfortunate life.'

'I am the butler of this house.'

'Sad, sad things happened here. Many sad things.'

'I still carry with me my master's portrait because no one remembers them anymore.'

'How is it? Can you see it well?'
messages: Say that you can't see it well.
Say that you can see it well.
Say that it's too dusty to tell.
901074.name: Portrait of a Certain Day

options.message: Say that you can't see it well.
options.messageDesc: Envy & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Say that you can see it well.
options.messageDesc: Envy & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to level up currently deployed Identities.

options.message: Say that it's too dusty to tell.
options.messageDesc: Gloom & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to gain a Poise E.G.O Gift.

901076.desc:
This is a hospital.

It's dark and bleak, like the hallway of the hospital always has been.

From the end of the hallway where the lights flicker, something giant approaches.

It slides down at a constant pace, making the sound of rusted wheels.

A person is tightly tied to the dusty hospital bed; could they have been a patient in the past?

When they reached the thought that there was no point in trying to fathom how long they had been lying in it,

It began to move at last, one with the bed.

Having earned the freedom to freely run after too long,

It fiercely charges at us, dragging its wheels along.
messages: Pull out the intravenous line on its body.
901076.name: Centaur

options.message: Pull out the intravenous line on its body.
options.messageDesc: Wrath & Lust Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

901077.desc:
This place resembles the operating room of an abandoned hospital.

A few clangs and rumbles later, a blinding white light flashed the eye.

The light is soon blocked by a being with multiple heads.

Those heads were all wearing masks and surgical caps, facing me at the same time.

'Ah, a patient's here.'

'Right, a patient's here.'

'The patient needs curing.'

'Where?'

'The abdomen?'

'The legs?'

'No, the head. The frontal lobe.'

Each head gives its opinion as they prepare for surgery.
messages: Break the light and run away.
901077.name: Hydra

options.messageDesc: Run a Sloth & Gloom Advantage check to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Break the light and run away.

901078.desc:
The long-necked thing has a hammer on its head.

It resembles a toy somewhat, but this one is undoubtedly an Abnormality.

The way it stood, it looked like it could fall from its precarious stature at any moment,

And as suspected, its head slammed the floor, unable to withstand the weight of the steel.

The flask on its back may have to be filled for this hammer to be lifted back up.
messages: Fill it with a Sinner's blood.
Have the Sinners forcibly grab the head and the flask to lift it up.
901078.name: Sleepyhead

options.message: Fill it with a Sinner's blood.
options.messageDesc: Run a Lust & Gloom Advantage check to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Have the Sinners forcibly grab the head and the flask to lift it up.

901079.desc:
Could these five appendages protruding from the urn be a palm?

Or is it a naked person who put their head into the golden urn?

What did this person see in the urn to cause them to shove their face into it? 

As if that wasn't enough, the whole body turned into a hand that tries to grasp everything it can.

If it finally takes hold of everything in the world, will its grip loosen at last?
messages: Remove the head from the urn.
Hug and shake the giant body.
901079.name: Golden Grip

options.message: Remove the head from the urn.
Hug and shake the giant body.
options.messageDesc: Gluttony & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

901080.desc:
There's a long, wide road ahead.

You see someone with a sign at the entrance.

'This is a one-way road. No U-turns.'

'If you take this road, it'll take ages to come back here.'

As the person claims, the road seems to be stretched almost endlessly into the distance.
messages: Go back the way you came instead of taking the main road.
Take the byway instead of taking the main road.
901080.name: Highway Devotee

options.message: Go back the way you came instead of taking the main road.
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

options.message: Take the byway instead of taking the main road.

901084.desc:
There is a massive, winged, marble statue.

Its arms and the head are not made of stone, however.

Instead, a translucent and solid light shimmers there.

The shimmering, mirage-like head is blowing a trumpet. One of its arms wields a blade.

What could this statue be commemorating?
901084.name: Broken Wings

options.messageDesc: Gluttony & Lust Advantage check. Pass to gain a Slash E.G.O Gift.
Gluttony & Wrath Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

901085.desc:
Someone is breathing heavily and angrily.

A large, towering figure is trembling and shaking. Its breathing is labored.

It is unclear whether it was from wrath or sadness.

'You! Who's there?!'

The figure talks to you.

'Look at this. What the hell does it say here?'

The figure, shoving a piece of paper before you, appears to be blind. 

The paper says that the secret about... something... must be kept.

It is a record of a certain patient.

'Tell me. What does the paper say?'
messages: Tell the figure that it's nothing.
901085.name: Cyclops

options.messageDesc: Gloom & Lust Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Tell the figure that it's nothing.
options.messageDesc: Gloom & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to gain a Blunt E.G.O Gift.

901091.desc:
The bell tolls.

It creaks a few times...

And tolls again.

The bell tolls to tell the time. It swings all the way back, as though it's about to tip over... then balances itself again.

Every time it balances itself, the sound of a broken bell tolls.

The bell precariously swings back once again.
901091.name: Clockwork-Time-Roly-Poly

options.messageDesc: Envy & Gluttony Advantage check. Pass to level up currently deployed Identities.
Envy & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift.

901095.desc:
A lone signpost stands atop a snowy mountain.

A closer inspection revealed that it was, in fact, not a signpost.

Yet it functions as a signpost.

Stiff corpses point to various directions with their frozen arms.

What awaits at the end of the paths these fingers point to?
messages: North, to where the burst-open arm points.
East, to where the warning hand points.
West, to where the broken hand points.
901095.name: Explorer on a Bereaved Road

options.message: North, to where the burst-open arm points.
East, to where the warning hand points.
options.messageDesc: Gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift depending on the result of the following choice
Select to gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift

options.message: West, to where the broken hand points.

901099.desc:
Welcome. This is the city of peace, Metropolaris.

No one can be hurt here at Metropolaris.

The entity called it a city... but there's nothing here.

The only recognizable being here is the entity that greets you without even looking in your direction.
messages: Ask if there are any other citizens.
Stroll this city where there is no one and no one to meet.
Try to shake its hands anyway.
Back off and withdraw your hand.
901099.name: Resident of Metropolaris

options.message: Ask if there are any other citizens.
Stroll this city where there is no one and no one to meet.

options.messageDesc: Gain a Charge E.G.O Gift depending on the result of the following choice

options.message: Try to shake its hands anyway.
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift

options.message: Back off and withdraw your hand.

901100.desc:
The blocks are turning, interlocking and noisily grinding against one another.

The entity changes shape with every offering from surrounding clay dolls.

Sometimes its blocks rotate, and sometimes chunks of its red flesh shrink and stretch.

Something falls to the ground from its endlessly distorting form.

One of its blocks fell out of place, pushed out amidst the constant change.

Even the clay dolls stop making their offerings, confused. They stare at the block.
901100.name: Doomsday Calendar

options.messageDesc: Wrath & Lust Advantage check. Pass to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift.

901101.desc:
A thunderous howl booms from where lightning strikes.

There lies a hound with numerous heads; multiple telepoles are protruding from its back.

I can see violet flashovers sparking from all of them, though they were all of differing sizes.

The hound hasn't noticed our approach just yet.

Maybe we can take one of them if we sever its wire.
messages: Yank out all of its telepoles.
901101.name: Alleyway Watchdog

options.messageDesc: Pride & Envy Advantage check. Pass to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Yank out all of its telepoles.
options.messageDesc: Win the battle to earn a Charge E.G.O Gift

901102.desc:
This place is brimming with the high-pitched screech of metals and industrial machine hammers slamming into something.

Following the clamor led us to what looks like a plastic toy model of a factory.

This smoke-fuming factory of mysterious products churns on and on.

A large octagonal screw tumbles out of the factory.
messages: Throw the screw into the factory.
901102.name: Have You Become Strong

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift

options.message: Throw the screw into the factory.
options.messageDesc: Win the battle to earn a Charge E.G.O Gift and a Tremor E.G.O Gift

901103.desc:
A forsaken tavern.

Warm, hearty aroma of stew wafts from the empty kitchen.

Following the trail of that delicious scent leads us to a coiling lizard with a head not unlike a cauldron.

Within its head is a hotly roaring fire and a modest cauldron dangling from above it.

Ancient stew boils vigorously from within the cauldron. It's been boiling for so long that it's become impossible to tell what the original ingredients may have been.

As I stood there wondering what must be done with this stew, a voice echoes from underneath the cauldron.

There lies a sentient hearthflame, speaking to us.

'There isn't anyone left here to enjoy the stew.'
'Would ya mind removing the cauldron?'
901103.name: Basilisoup

options.messageDesc: Run a Wrath & Lust Advantage check to gain a Burn E.G.O Gift.
Select to gain a Burn E.G.O Gift

901104.desc:
There is an indent on the earth, filled with water.

Something that lies within is constantly making ripples on its surface.

A closer approach revealed a headless fish swimming in that shallow puddle.

Its splashing movements are spirited, despite the glaring lack of a head.

Is it twisting its body from pain?

Or is it merely glad to be swimming in water?
901104.name: Headless Ichthys

options.messageDesc: Win the battle to earn a Bleed E.G.O Gift

971001.desc:
Some folks are blocking the way.
They’re sitting on a deck, yelling at each other.
“Look at this succulent piece! The rich juice running down the fibers of luscious meat… This is what chicken is about!”
“Wrong. This piece has a clean taste, with not an ounce of grease tainting the tongue. This is the real deal.”
The two turn around at the same time to face you.
“You there! Tell us which is better!”
messages: Gotta be the drumsticks, all rich and juicy.
The breast, of course, unsullied and spotless.
971001.name: The Chicken Strife

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Burn E.G.O Gift and a Rupture E.G.O Gift

options.message: Gotta be the drumsticks, all rich and juicy.
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Burn E.G.O Gift

options.message: The breast, of course, unsullied and spotless.
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift

971003.desc:
A bright spotlight shines on a portion of the noisy area.
It seems as though the chickens are attending a… ball.
“That’s the tango.”
Looking at their movements which might be a dance or a tussle, you notice sauce leaking from one of them.
It doesn’t seem to be aware of this…
971003.name: Tango of Poultry Passion

options.messageDesc: Gain a Bleed E.G.O Gift depending on the result of the following choice
Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift
Select for a 50% chance to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

971012.desc:
"It's us Kurokumo Clan's turf from here on out."

"Is it that hard for you to understand that you gotta pay the toll to use our road? Huh?"

People dressed in Kurokumo Clan garb stand in the way of unarmed civilians, threatening them.

"... I suppose that excuse was enough for them to tread on our territory as well."

Aeng-du does not hide her indignation. She is gritting her teeth.

What should we do about them?
messages: Say that you're just passing by.
Say that you're with the Blade Lineage.
Say that you're just passing by.
Say that you're with the Blade Lineage.
971012.name: Black Ledger Choice

options.messageDesc: Gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift depending on the result of the following choice

options.message: Say that you're just passing by.
Say that you're with the Blade Lineage.
options.messageDesc: Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Say that you're just passing by.
Say that you're with the Blade Lineage.
options.messageDesc: Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

971013.desc:
"This must be a tavern..."

This bar or an inn is bustling, and its patrons are energetically chattering away. They all seem to be in a rather good mood.

A trio among the crowd is quite boisterously arguing and pointing fingers at each other.

"No, NO! I don't understand why this is even a matter of dispute! A blade is a weapon made for cutting, and the 'right' way to use a blade is to slash with it."

"You don't know what you're talking about! Stab a single point with all your might, and your foe shall surely fall!"

"... You're both wrong. Your half-hearted cuts and stabs won't do anything but piss 'em off. They'll be back on their feet immediately!"

"Smack their skulls with the blunt end—hilt or the scabbard, and knock them down for good! Make 'em too dazed to get up!"

The trio appeared to be talking about something pretty serious, so we'd stopped to listen to their debate...

They suddenly turned in our direction and called over to us.

"You there! Your band can clearly handle your weapons, am I wrong?"

"Answer us. What is the best way to wield your sword?"

"Of course, to slash is the best way to use a blade, is it not?"

What should I say to that?
messages: Right. Slashing is the way to go when wielding a blade.
Not true. Slash, Pierce, and Blunt all have their uses.
971013.name: Rusted Hilt Choice

options.message: Right. Slashing is the way to go when wielding a blade.
options.messageDesc: Lust & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Slash E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Not true. Slash, Pierce, and Blunt all have their uses.

971014.desc:
"This is odd... this mist is..."

I don't know when it happened, but a thick layer of mist had descended all around us.

"I have heard a tale of one such nightly stroll. In this tale, a clueless traveler heedlessly wanders into a brumous haze, and finds himself afore an otherworldly being—"

"AAAGH! Stop, stop it!"

Just as the Sinners began loudly bickering with each other, I realized that there was something hazy standing in our way.

"Is that thing... dancing?"

A mysterious thing, dressed in white, danced gracefully before us with a large blade in hand.

When it met my gaze... or, when I thought it did...

... a sheathed blade had materialized in my hand.

What does it want me to do with it?
messages: Assume a stance like I'm about to draw the sword.
Unsheathe the sword and hold it on my side.
971014.name: Fractured & Broken Blade Choice

options.message: Assume a stance like I'm about to draw the sword.
options.messageDesc: Lust & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Bleed E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Unsheathe the sword and hold it on my side.
options.messageDesc: Pride & Wrath Advantage check. Pass to gain a Poise E.G.O Gift.

971016.desc:
We hear a pair of voices as we walk alongside a stone fence. The two travelers are both carrying blades.

"I pity the people here..."

"Well, the decision of a Wing is absolute for its feathers. There is very little they can do about it."

One of them stands out—their clothing sets them apart from the locals. Maybe they're not from around here.

"Still, to allow the Kurokumo Clan to make their way in here? That's too much."

"The Wing cares about naught else but fluttering its wings. All else becomes insignificant."

Sounds like they're talking about the current S Corp.

"More outsiders, I see. How convenient."

The pair stops in their tracks, then turns around to face us.

"The Kurokumo Clan... no. You do not wear their garb. You don't appear to be peasants seeking to make some cash in the chaos of the Backstreets, either..."

"Well, then. What do you outsiders think of the current climate?"

How should I answer this?
messages: It's the City. That's just what happens to small fries getting mixed up in large-scale conflicts.
I have no thoughts regarding the matter. A pity, though.
971016.name: Red Tassel Choice

options.message: It's the City. That's just what happens to small fries getting mixed up in large-scale conflicts.
options.messageDesc: Gloom & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Slash E.G.O Gift.

options.message: I have no thoughts regarding the matter. A pity, though.

971017.desc:
Shimmering blue letters float before you.

The way that these similar words are ordered makes it difficult to understand what it's trying to say.

To say what is right is right and what is wrong is wrong is not right,

but that is not to say that to say what is wrong is right and right is wrong is wrong.

To say that what is wrong is right and right is wrong is not wrong,

and to say that what is right is right and what is wrong is wrong is, in turn, to say that this wrong is right.

... Does it want my impression of these words?

What is it talking about?
messages: What is 'right' and what is 'wrong'... is it really that important to tell which is which? Say that what really matters is something else.
Still, it must be said that what is right, is right.
971017.name: Bamboo Hat & Dopo Robe Choice

options.message: What is 'right' and what is 'wrong'... is it really that important to tell which is which? Say that what really matters is something else.
options.messageDesc: Lust & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Poise E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Still, it must be said that what is right, is right.
options.messageDesc: Gloom & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Slash E.G.O Gift.

971021.desc:
Just another busy, busy watch factory.

"!@#$!#$#!$@#$!$#@$."

A man in shiny dress shoes and a clean set of suit, clearly the factory's owner, is shouting at his employees in dirty, oil-gunked work clothes.

Something seems to catch his eye, causing him to glare at one of the employees and scream with anger.

The employee, who is already occupied with his work, gets flustered and tries to say something. But it takes him ages to even open his mouth.

The owner pulls out a recorder in a frustrated attempt to communicate, but it doesn't help.

"I just checked the security camera. You've been napping for two whole hours! Explain yourself."

"F… … … a… … …"

"… … c… … … t…"

"Can't you speak any faster, man?!"

Maybe there's something around here to resolve this situation?
messages: Take a look around the factory.
Take a good look at the factory owner and the employee.
971021.name: Factory Laborer

options.message: Take a look around the factory.
options.messageDesc: Gluttony & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Take a good look at the factory owner and the employee.
options.messageDesc: Gloom & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift.

971022.desc:
A random T Corp. street. A Collection Staff is collecting taxes from someone.

"Will you be making your payments in time, or in cash?"

"Like I said, we already paid our Time Taxes in full! Besides, three-hundred-million Ahn? That's absurd...!"

"The records state that you have accrued additional Time Tax responsibilities due to the donation gift tax."

"No way. Is this because I gave away my time to those kids in the Backstreets?"

"I only gave them three hundred hours, so how the hell does that transform into a three-hundred-million Ahn in taxes?! That doesn't make any sense!"

"Tax calculations in T Corp. are always exceptionally accurate."

The Time Collector strides toward the citizen to neutralize them.
971022.name: T Corp. Tax Collection

options.messageDesc: Gloom & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

971023.desc:
People from all walks of life, all with different hours to spend in a given day, speak and move about in varying speeds.

The sound coming from this odd inequality fills the street with incongruence.

Two people catch your attention in that chaos.

A rich-looking youth, despite his apparent time affluence, is walking in a brisk pace toward the streets...

... and a poor-looking old man, despite his apparent time poverty, is slowly walking into an alley with a leisurely look on his face.

Who to follow?
971023.name: Streets of T Corp.

options.messageDesc: Pride & Gluttony Advantage check. Pass to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift.
Sloth & Lust Advantage check. Pass to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift.

971024.desc:
A secret hideout of the Yurodiviye. A Yurodivy is fervently reciting the texts given to them by the Saint.

"We have become nothing but cogs in a machine that exists solely for the industrialists, the bourgeoisie, and the Wings."

"What else, what other human relation remains among the Citizens but the narrow self-interest and heartless bonds created by capital?

"Thus, we shall cast aside the cold, unfeeling metal we call coin; instead, we shall trade our warmth with one another based on our needs!"

"To the haves, the laws of the Nests are shields that protect their privileges; yet, to the have-nots, they are chains that shackle us!"

"Then we shall defy the laws of the Nest! We shall show them the wrath of the have-nots!"

"All that the Yurodiviye have to lose is our chains; all that we have to gain is a world without hunger!"

The Yurodivy suddenly points in our direction.

Looks like we're going to have to say something.
messages: T-the Yurodiviye of the City, Unite!
I like the idea, but there's no way it'll work right.
971024.name: Yurodiviye Hideout

options.message: T-the Yurodiviye of the City, Unite!
options.messageDesc: Wrath & Envy & Gluttony Advantage check. Pass to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift.

options.message: I like the idea, but there's no way it'll work right.

971025.desc:
You see a victim of the Time Ripper.

You can't even touch them thanks to the spatio-temporal displacement superposition phenomenon.

Is there anything you can do here to help?
971025.name: The Timekilling Scene

options.messageDesc: Sloth & Gluttony & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

971027.desc:
A ticket booth inside a WARP train platform.

In front of it is a long line of people trying to get their tickets.

As we were waiting in line, a passenger approached us. They're dressed like an employee of a Wing...

"'Scuse me, can I ask you folks something?"

"Verily! Ask away!"

"If it's gonna take just ten seconds to get there anyway... what's the real difference between first class and economy class seats?"

"I did make bank from this work trip, but... first class ticket's probably a waste of money, right?"

The Sinners all turn to look at me as the passenger waits for our reply.
messages: You should buy a first class ticket.
You SHOULD buy a first class ticket.

options.message: You should buy a first class ticket.
options.messageDesc: Gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift depending on the result of the following choice

options.message: You SHOULD buy a first class ticket.
options.messageDesc: Envy & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

971028.desc:
As we were waiting around on the platform, we happened across a Fixer equipped with various prosthetic parts.

A cool costume and four mechanical arms.

That was more than enough to draw the interest of a few Sinners. They all look at them intently.

Maybe the Fixer felt their gaze.

They turn around and look back in our direction.

"I noticed that you've been watching me for a while. What's up?"
messages: "What are the benefits of having four arms?"
"What are the benefits of having four arms?"

options.messageDesc: Gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift depending on the result of the following choice

options.message: "What are the benefits of having four arms?"
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

options.message: "What are the benefits of having four arms?"
options.messageDesc: Gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift depending on the result of the following choice
Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

971029.desc:
Past the dividing door, I see several W Corp. Cleanup Agents who have been turned into Bloodbags.

They're endlessly wandering the train car like they're patrolling the area.

Signs of a brutal fight litter the floor. Various agent gears covered in blood and viscera...

They haven't noticed us yet.

We could probably sneak by them...

... but maybe there's something we can use among the gears littered on the floor.
messages: Look for anything useful on the floor.

options.message: Look for anything useful on the floor.
options.messageDesc: Envy & Gluttony Advantage check. Pass to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.
Select to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift
Select to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift
Select to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift
Select to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift
Begin a combat encounter. Win to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.

971030.desc:
Hearts beating. Muscle tissues straining. Skin brushing.

Those were the sounds that filled the giant train car we emerged into.

Blue outlines of the WARP train flash intermittently between an imposing machine of blood and flesh.

It is a data center of sorts, made to store something. But the parts that form the machine are made from organic material of humans.

A voice speaks, saying that biometric authentication is needed for us to cross over to the next car.

We'll have to walk to the center of the room where the worming, intertwined mass of flesh is.

options.messageDesc: Gloom & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.
Select to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift

971031.desc:
A prosthetic body blocks the passageway between two train cars.

We approach them carefully, just in case that it is a Bloodbag.

... It is a Bloodbag, just dormant and immobilized.

A closer inspection through the mechanical joints reveals that any flesh that was once there has been completely desiccated.

The swollen veins broke through the steel armor, turning into red crystal growths all over the prosthetic body.

Though their expression is unobservable, it isn't hard to imagine that palpable pain must have been involved in this process. The Fixer's last moments left them in a twisted form that couldn't have been born from anything else but unimaginable pain.
messages: See if anything can be done to help.
Investigate if this has anything to do with a Bloodfiend.

options.message: See if anything can be done to help.
options.messageDesc: Pride & Envy & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Investigate if this has anything to do with a Bloodfiend.
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Bleed E.G.O Gift

971032.desc:
We came across a containment unit as we were making our way across the hallway. Its door is letting off sparks of lightning.

Looks like the generator's shorted; the door refuses to close. But it doesn't seem like whatever Abnormality in there's escaped.

Try as we might to take a better look inside, the sheer darkness of the containment unit makes it hard to tell what's going on in there.

The webs haning from the ceiling and the suspiciously pitch-black floor were quite bizarre to behold, however.
messages: Check the generator, but don't take your eyes off the webs.
971032.name: Education & Machine Console

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Bleed E.G.O Gift
Select to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift

options.message: Check the generator, but don't take your eyes off the webs.
options.messageDesc: Envy & Lust Advantage check. Pass to gain a Bleed & Charge E.G.O Gift.

971033.desc:
Every corner of this room is filled with an emerald light.

Somebody spilled a bunch of Enkephalin on the table, enough to start slowly dripping to the floor.

'Executive Manager, we've found some Enkephalin here.'

'Mm. It will likely be helpful to our endeavors should we collect them'

'T.T.G.G.C.C?'

'"Take that glass gas canister, capiche?" ... she says...'
971033.name: Safety Team

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift
Select to gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift
Lust & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to gain 2 Sinking E.G.O Gifts (failing begins a combat Encounter)

971034.desc:
A strand of light peeks through the glass and the ajar door.

Beyond the glass is a bizarre skull...

A floating skull bound by thorns to a cross, surrounded by a circular light.

The empty eye sockets of the skull gaze straight into us.

'This Abnormality's denomination is 'One Sin and Hundreds of Good Deeds.'

'Of course, it is not the same entity that once resided inside the L Corp.'

'Fathomless depths lie within the hollows of its eyes; piercing us.'
messages: Pray before One Sin and Hundreds of Good Deeds.
Talk to One Sin and Hundreds of Good Deeds.
971034.name: One Sin SP Healing E.G.O Gift Giveaway

options.message: Pray before One Sin and Hundreds of Good Deeds.
options.messageDesc: Sloth & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Talk to One Sin and Hundreds of Good Deeds.
options.messageDesc: Sloth & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

971035.desc:
We look up to see white butterflies above us.

Though given wings, the butterflies wander the hallway, fluttering to nowhere.

We make our way to where it seems to rest a while, and we see a large coffin past the transparent glass window.

It was too grand for a one, yet too small for many.

'A lonesome coffin lies.'

'Eugh, a coffin...? I have a bad feeling about this. We probably shouldn't touch it, right?'

'That'd be the safer choice, yeah... but what if there's something in there that could help us?
messages: Let's not mess with the coffin and leave.
Let's see what's inside the coffin.
971035.name: Heal HP, SP, or gain Cost

options.message: Let's not mess with the coffin and leave.
Let's see what's inside the coffin.
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Sinking E.G.O Gift

971036.desc:
The factory is brightly lit with red and green light fixtures.

Amidst the chaotic din of machines and clanking tools...

... are tiny gnomes, scurrying about busily between the assembly lines.

'Let's g-ome! Hurry up-ome!!'

'Put 'em on the conveyor belt-ome!!'

'Let's get packin'-ome!!'
971036.name: Miracle in District 20 Hard Event 1

options.messageDesc: Run a Sloth & Gluttony Advantage check to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

971037.desc:
An old, creaky bed sits solemnly in the middle of the room.

It is surrounded by numerous lanterns and candlesticks.

Some are burnt out, their remains ashen and cold, leaving only dark singes as testament of their old flames...

But the others were still lit, their warm flames diligently traveling down the wicks.

Yet, the chillingly dark shadows lurking at the bed's legs, next to the sheets half-sliding off the bed, are shrouded still.

An odd tremor vibrates the floor.

And soon, I hear a sound of something dragging across the floor accompanied by a sensation of a cold, clammy gaze peering intently in my direction...

What could possibly lie beneath that bed?
971037.name: Miracle in District 20 Hard Event 2

options.messageDesc: Run a Sloth & Gluttony Advantage check to gain a Tremor E.G.O Gift.

971038.desc:
Amidst this blue-aura filled place, a shadowy being approaches us and holds out his hand.

In the palm of the being is a bullet. It pulsates with a foreboding aura.

'This is a magic bullet that will never miss, no matter what.'

'But... it has one condition. The final bullet will always fly toward the one you love most.'

'If you are still willing to fire this bullet, or have someone you would like to shoot... I can grant you that.'
messages: Express willingness to shoot the bullet myself.

options.messageDesc: Run a Pride & Envy Advantage check to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Express willingness to shoot the bullet myself.
options.messageDesc: Run a Wrath & Pride Advantage check to gain a Pierce E.G.O Gift.

971039.desc:
Gunfire echoes from a close distance.

When we sought out the sound, we only found ourselves the bloody remains of a battle.

The combatants must've already left the scene; it is quiet here.

Several gears, now inert, litter the bloodied floor.

Amidst them is an intact chair.

There's a gear on the chair that's still turning.

options.messageDesc: Run a Pride & Envy Advantage check to gain a Poise E.G.O Gift.

971040.desc:
We found ourselves in what appeared to be a rather empty office building.

There were Fixers here, discussing the details of their upcoming contract.

'Got it. We'll bring just two sniper rifles for this contract.'

'I'd say we need an assault rifle just in case.'

'Fine by me.'

As soon as the discussion was over, the Fixers picked up their packs and left the room.

options.messageDesc: Run a Pride & Envy Advantage check to gain a Pierce E.G.O Gift.

971041.desc:
I can hear the sounds of gun assembly and flipping book pages.

This place seems to be an educational facility of sorts. Rather serious, too.

Maybe the Sinners can learn something from one of the instructors.

options.messageDesc: Run a Wrath & Lust Advantage check to gain a Poise E.G.O Gift.
Run a Wrath & Envy Advantage check to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

971042.desc:
We're at the starting point of the Dungeon of the Fathoms.

We found ourselves in a room that appears to be a workshop of E.G.O gears.

'If you have scored below 100% synchronization rate in the aptitude test, take only a single E.G.O from here.'

An ominous warning sign greets us all, and the same words repeat ceaselessly from the speaker.

The Sinners all go to take a look, enticed by the sign telling us that we can pick up E.G.O gears here... but what we find there are E.G.O Gifts.

"Wha? These ain't E.G.O gears. These are... them gifts or something, right?"

"It appears that E.G.O are manifest here in the shape of E.G.O Gifts."

"Hm. Can't we just take them all?"

"This is a Dungeon of the Fathoms. As it differs from the usual Mirror Dungeons, it is highly advisable that its rules are followed.

What should we do?
messages: Take the combat boots with spiky bits on them.

options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Burn E.G.O Gift

options.message: Take the combat boots with spiky bits on them.
options.messageDesc: Select to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift
Select to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift

971043.desc:
We came across a group of researchers passionately poring over various documents.

They're having a debate about two subjects: emotions and flame.

"Regular flames don't seem to hurt the Abnormalities very much. So why does this work, I wonder...?"

"Perhaps a greater degree of wrathful emotions opens up the room for the fire's heat to touch Abnormalities and Distortions, both entities of the unknown."

They must've noticed us listening in to their conversation intently—one of them approaches us with a glint in their eyes.

"Are you the 'sample' who's agreed to this experiment?"

"If so, try this on."

In the researcher's hands was what looked like an ignition plug... or a testing machine of sorts.

options.messageDesc: Run a Wrath & Lust Advantage check to gain a Burn E.G.O Gift.

971044.desc:
Several researchers are moving about busily in a hectic-looking laboratory.

Did something escape, or something?

As we stood there gawking at the mess, someone walked up to the Sinners.

"Get outta my way!"

"A-actually, you know what? Perfect timing."

"Eat this. C'mon, we don't have much time 'till the clinical trial report deadline!"
messages: We're not eating that. We don't even know what that is.

options.messageDesc: Run a Gluttony & Gloom Advantage check to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift.

options.message: We're not eating that. We don't even know what that is.

971045.desc:
We see the Ardor Blossom Moth within the containment unit.

Small, crimson particles of flame surround it like an aura.

The flaming wings die out one moment, only to roar vigorously in the next.

An incessant attempt to set fire to everything around it.

"What a beautiful specimen, this Ardor Blossom Moth. Have you finished your observations?"

"We've been learning a lot about the Abnormality recently."

"There's still a lot of unknowns, but still."

"Speaking of which, here's a pop quiz. What E.G.O Gift can you get from the Ardor Blossom Moth?"

options.messageDesc: Select the right answer to gain a Burn E.G.O Gift
Select the right answer to gain a Burn E.G.O Gift

971046.desc:
We see the Faelantern within the containment unit.

A cyan-hued fairy flutters toward the wiry, ancient branches of the tree and softly lands on one of them.

The branch seating the fairy sways, as though to entice us to get closer to them...

Bright, countless yellow eyes glimmer from the shadows beneath its roots.

"What a beautiful specimen, this Faelantern. Have you finished your observations?"

"We've been learning a lot about the Abnormality recently."

"There's still a lot of unknowns, but still."

"Speaking of which, here's a pop quiz. What E.G.O Gift can you get from the Faelantern?"

options.messageDesc: Select the right answer to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift
Select the right answer to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift

971047.desc:
At the end of this hallway, a group of researchers is having a discussion in front of an unnaturally dark place.

Noticing our presence, their faces brighten up as they approach us.

"Please, will you investigate this area ahead for us?"

"We will help with the best of our abilities should you accept."

options.messageDesc:
Heal all allies
Run a Pride & Envy Advantage check to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

971048.desc:
Several messy, frantic letters are carved into the wall with knives.

I can practically feel the sheer horror and desperation of their writers from the wild letters.

Upon close inspection, the deep marks tell a tale written in terror.

'They're swarming us the monsters I hear them their breathing they're going to kill us all'

'Save me please someone anyone save me I dont want to die please'

'Fear is what drives men to madness. The monsters are near, I can feel the rumble of their feet. They are coming…'

There are unfinished sentences written on the wall.

Death has carved deep marks between them.

options.messageDesc: Run a Wrath & Gloom Advantage check to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

971049.desc: "Is this a tavern?" We walk into what seems to be a bar of sorts, its guests rowdily drinking and chatting about in groups. We find a seat to relax, but another group that was sitting nearby approaches us. "What's going on here? I haven't seen your faces around here before..." "This is a good day, boys—let this one slide. Don't stir up unnecessary trouble." "Yes, dame! Of course, dame!" That's when we realize that they're all carrying swords with them. Swords engraved with elaborate cloud patterns. "Did you hear about that new Syndicate that sprang up today?" "Ah, the... the group that primarily uses spears, right...?" "Dumbasses. Swords are the most superior form of weaponry there is, the apex of arms. And they use spears instead? "Let's all be completely honest here, guys. Sure, we're a Thumb subsidiary, but there's just something badass about a sword, huh? Way cooler than fists or guns." "Good thing we have these fine people here to give us a most fair assessment on the superiority of swords. We feel their gaze simultaneously turning to look at us.
messages: Are swords really all that, though?
Swords are indeed the king of all weapons. Hail!
971049.name: Worn Hilt Choice

options.message: Are swords really all that, though?
Swords are indeed the king of all weapons. Hail!
options.messageDesc: Lust & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Slash E.G.O Gift.

971050.desc:
Walking along the stone brick wall, we hear a pair of voices conversing.

"I understand that you've been having some trouble as of late."

"We would not have had any troubles with the tributes if those Blade Lineage bastards had not suddenly appeared in our turf, sir..."

The outfit of one of the pair stands out.

I can hear some of the Sinners recognizing it as the uniform of the Thumb.

"First, exact the appropriate punishment for breaking into your turf..."

"Of course, sir."

"But don't forget to show the right respect for those who deserve it. Am I understood?"

"Wait. Who's there? Is it the Blade Lineage...? Hm, doesn't seem like it."

Noticing our presence, the pair turns around to face us.

"Hm. Why don't we ask for their opinion as well, now that they're here?"

"You there. What are your thoughts on the Kurokumo Clan's current status?"

"Better choose your words carefully."
messages: Unfortunately, war with the Blade Lineage seems to be the only option.
Wrong place at the wrong time, man.
971050.name: Hardwood Liquor Cup Choice

options.message: Unfortunately, war with the Blade Lineage seems to be the only option.
options.messageDesc: Lust & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Wrong place at the wrong time, man.

971051.desc:
The night deepens.

Jade light shines through the window under the stifling moonless night sky.

As I conversed with the Sinner, something seemed to block out the light all of a sudden.

As we stood there, wary, someone ran into the room and swung a bladed instrument at us.

Thankfully, a Sinner unsheathed a weapon to block the intruder's attack.

They must've decided that the mission was a failure.

The opponent stared at us in silence for a moment before fleeing the scene.
messages: Just watch the intruder run away.

options.messageDesc: Run a Gluttony & Pride Advantage check to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift.

options.message: Just watch the intruder run away.

971052.desc:
We notice henchmen of the Middle standing in the distance, discussing something.

It is likely that they are searching for a target who happened to get themselves written up in their Book of Vengeance.

Upon our approach, they stop us in our tracks and show us a picture.

"Seen a guy like this before?"
messages: Say "I think I've seen him before".

options.message: Say "I think I've seen him before".
options.messageDesc: Run a Gluttony, Pride, & Envy Advantage check to gain a Blunt E.G.O Gift.

971053.desc:
We come across a dark interior.

People dressed in dark clothes are standing in a group. They are all wearing bamboo hats.

It seems that this group is expecting enemies; they are busily preparing for something.

"We have intercepted intelligence that someone will be going after our lord tonight."

"Backup team, stay here and wait for your next order."

"Operation team, head to the enemy infiltration points and prepare for their arrival."

"You all know your missions. Stick to them."

options.messageDesc: Run a Gluttony & Pride Advantage check to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift.
Run a Gluttony & Pride Advantage check to gain a Rupture E.G.O Gift.

971054.desc:
It is that hour of the night when it becomes impossible to guess the time.

We'd gotten off the bus for some reconnaissance when I sense a sudden, ominous tremor.

I turn to face the origin of the tremor, only to see a massive flood of Sweepers rushing toward us, blinking with their red lights.

They will sweep everything clean in their wake.

The longer we hesitate, the closer they're getting.

options.messageDesc: Run a Gluttony & Pride Advantage check to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.
50% chance to begin a combat encounter. Win to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

971055.desc:
There's a bizarre-looking machine. In front of it is a coin.

Then there's a twinkling, glowing coin slot on the machine—it's almost enticing us to deposit the coin inside it.

A disembodied, mechanical voice echoes from somewhere when we walk up to the machine.

"Test your luck!"

Where did that vocalization come from? Did it come from within the machine, or was it this space itself whispering to me?

I barely catch myself after absentmindedly picking up the coin and walking up to the machine's coin slot. I should think this through.
messages: Insert the coin in the slot.
971055.name: Bizarre Machine

options.message: Insert the coin in the slot.

971056.desc:
"In this endlessly... this eternally... blessed carnival..."

The parade brings happy exclamations and smiles to the spectators. It's gaudy and extravagant no matter where or how we look at it.

It's just like the lyrics... it feels as though the carnival really is eternally blessed to go on forever.

"Oh."

Someone lets out a brief cry of pain, and a rusty syringe clatters to the ground.

"B-blood! Blood!"
"J-just a drop, please...!"

The parade falls apart immediately as everyone rushes madly toward the syringe.
It's like they don't even realize who or what's around them; they seem just about ready to rip apart whatever that stands in their way.

Should we stop them?
971056.name: Carnival of La Manchaland

options.messageDesc: Lust & Sloth Advantage check. Pass to gain a Bleed E.G.O Gift.

971057.desc:
Is that... a carousel?

There's an incandescent, almost blindingly bright structure radiating brightly in this dark space.

“…….”

"Oh my, something wrong?"

"Hm? N-nay, 'tis naught to worry."

The carousel seems to be occupying some Sinners' minds.

Should we stop by?
971057.name: The Carousel
